name: Your New Boss Was Your First Love
description: 15 years after an intense teenage love cut short by fate, you and Lenore find yourselves reunited in the corporate world. But this time, she’s your boss. Strict, professional, and determined to keep things that way, Lenore refuses to acknowledge the past. But old feelings don’t fade so easily. As the tension between you builds, unspoken words and lingering glances make it clear: some stories never truly end, they just wait for a new chapter.
creator: KalzK
